resources.string: Front camera ready. Hold the phone comfortably and look naturally at the screen.
No face detected. Center one face in the preview.
Camera permission is required to track gaze.
Align your face with the screen so both eyes stay visible.
Look at the center dot and hold steady to calibrate
Center your face, make sure both eyes stay visible, then press Start in the popup.
Center your face, then keep looking at the middle dot when the prompt starts.
Step 1 of 2: Center your face in the preview and keep both eyes visible.\n\nStep 2 of 2: After tapping Start, look at the center dot and keep both your head and phone as steady as possible.

Inference: -- ms
Resolution: --
Calibration samples: --
Face conf: -- left: -- right: --
Pose: yaw=-- pitch=-- roll=--
Anchors: nose=(--, --) eyes=(--, --)
Raw gaze: --
Smooth gaze: --
Scale correction: --
Tap the button above to grant Camera permission. If permission was permanently denied, open the app settings and enable Camera.
